Configuration for pre-commit hooks with monthly auto-updates for code quality checks.

# Purpose
The configuration file defines a continuous integration (CI) setup with an auto-update schedule set to monthly. It specifies two repositories for pre-commit hooks: `https://github.com/astral-sh/ruff-pre-commit` at revision `v0.1.13` with hooks `ruff` and `ruff-format`, and `https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks` at revision `v4.5.0` with hooks `check-merge-conflict`, `debug-statements`, `fix-byte-order-marker`, `trailing-whitespace`, and `end-of-file-fixer`. These hooks are used to enforce code quality and consistency checks before commits.
